Package neqsim.process.chemistry.scale

Class ClosedLoopDepositionSolver

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.chemistry.scale.ClosedLoopDepositionSolver
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class ClosedLoopDepositionSolver extends Object implements Serializable
Closed-loop deposition-flow solver.

Iteratively couples a ScaleDepositionAccumulator with the host PipeBeggsAndBrills pipe so that the wall thickness build-up shrinks the effective internal diameter, raises the local velocity and shear, and feeds back into the next deposition pass. The loop terminates when the maximum thickness change between successive iterations falls below a tolerance, or after a maximum number of iterations.

This captures one of the most important physical effects missing from screening-level scale predictors: the run-away condition where a thin deposit accelerates further deposition through higher local mass-transfer rates and ultimately blocks the line.

Algorithm per iteration k:

  1. Run pipe hydraulics with current effective diameter d_k.
  2. Run ScaleDepositionAccumulator.evaluate() → max thickness th_k.
  3. Update effective diameter d_(k+1) = d_0 - 2 * th_k / 1000.
  4. Stop when |d_(k+1) - d_k| < tol_m or k >= maxIter or d_(k+1) <= 0.

The original pipe diameter is restored after the solve so that the host ProcessSystem state is unchanged.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

  • Constructor Details

    • ClosedLoopDepositionSolver

      public ClosedLoopDepositionSolver(PipeBeggsAndBrills pipe, ScaleDepositionAccumulator accumulator)
      Constructs a solver bound to the given pipe and accumulator.
      Parameters:
      pipe - the host Beggs-and-Brills pipe
      accumulator - the scale deposition accumulator (already configured with brine chemistry)

  • Method Details

    • setToleranceM

      public ClosedLoopDepositionSolver setToleranceM(double tolM)
      Sets the convergence tolerance on the effective diameter (m).
      Parameters:
      tolM - tolerance [m], default 1e-4 m
      Returns:
      this for chaining

    • setMaxIterations

      public ClosedLoopDepositionSolver setMaxIterations(int n)
      Sets the maximum number of iterations.
      Parameters:
      n - maximum iterations, default 10
      Returns:
      this for chaining

    • solve

      public ClosedLoopDepositionSolver solve()
      Runs the coupled deposition-flow loop.
      Returns:
      this for chaining

      Returns the iteration history of average mixture velocities.

      public boolean isConverged()
      Returns whether the solver converged within tolerance.

      true if converged
